headline: Fed Chair Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
summary: Earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with nearly 20% of the S&P 500 scheduled to report quarterly earnings. Big names reporting include Tesla, Boeing and Intel. Investors will also watch the scheduled testimony of Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair, for signals on how he’d lead the central bank.

content.title: Fed Chair Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
content.summary: Earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with nearly 20% of the S&P 500 scheduled to report quarterly earnings. Big names reporting include Tesla, Boeing and Intel. Investors will also watch the scheduled testimony of Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair, for signals on how he’d lead the central bank.
